videos.headline: Coan connects with Mayer to put the Irish up early
videos.description: Notre Dame QB Jack Coan tosses a 41-yard touchdown pass to Michael Mayer on their opening drive.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Coan connects with Mayer to put the Irish up early) 2021/09/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Corbin breaks free for 89-yard FSU TD
videos.description: FSU RB Jashuan Corbin gets the handoff and speeds 89 yards down the field for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Corbin breaks free for 89-yard FSU TD) 2021/09/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Travis keeps it himself to put FSU ahead
videos.description: Florida State QB Jordan Travis calls his own number and finds the end zone for the touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_Onw-Play (Travis keeps it himself to put FSU ahead) 2021/09/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Hamilton comes away with INT for the Irish
videos.description: FSU QB Jordan Travis throws toward the sidelines and is picked off by Notre Dame safety Kyle Hamilton.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Hamilton comes away with INT for the Irish) 2021/09/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Wilkins wins tug-of-war battle for Irish TD
videos.description: Notre Dame QB Jack Coan lobs it to Joe Wilkins Jr., who makes the catch with a defender all over him.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Wilkins wins tug-of-war battle for Irish TD) 2021/09/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Travis finds Douglas for 60-yard FSU score
videos.description: FSU QB Jordan Travis tosses downfield and connects with Ja'Khi Douglas for a big touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Travis finds Douglas for 60-yard FSU score) 2021/09/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Coan drops dime to Austin as Notre Dame responds

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Coan drops dime to Austin as Notre Dame responds) 2021/09/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Coan tosses 4th TD of the game for the Irish
videos.description: Notre Dame QB Jack Coan tallies his fourth touchdown pass of the game after finding Kyren WIlliams for the score.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Coan tosses 4th TD of the game for the Irish) 2021/09/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: FSU fan not happy with another ND TD
videos.description: Notre Dame RB Chris Tyree muscles across the goal line to widen the Fighting Irish's lead over Florida State.

videos.headline: McKenzie Milton orchestrates TD drive in first action since injury
